location: Purchased for 3,800 runes from the Nomadic Merchant camped beside the Forest-Spanning Greatbridge in Altus Plateau.
tactics: The merchant sits at a campfire on the east side of the broken bridge, right next to the Forest-Spanning Greatbridge site of grace — no combat needed, just runes.
He also stocks Stonesword Keys and other shields/armor, so budget extra runes if you want his full inventory.
lore: A plain iron greatshield large enough to cover the whole body, stamped with the image of two old, interleaving trees.

builds.name: Early full-block Strength tank
builds.why: 100% physical damage negation at a reasonable Strength requirement, purchasable as soon as you reach Altus Plateau without any farming.
